item.title: China’s political conclave begins with growth target centre stage
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Analysts fear Beijing will not veer far from its current path despite the need for reform.
Matched: budget(+3), law(+3), corruption(+3), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3), startup(+2), outbreak(+3)

item.title: Canada’s PM says Israeli-US strikes on Iran ‘inconsistent with international law’
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Mark Carney’s remarks were made during his Australian visit, calling for a rapid de-escalation of the conflict.
Matched: law(+3), parliament(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Latest developments in the Middle East war
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Iran’s Revolutionary Guards say they have 'complete control' of the Strait of Hormuz, while the US Navy stands ready to escort oil tankers through the crucial Gulf shipping route.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2), outbreak(+3)

item.title: UK and France to begin repatriation flights from Middle East
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Hundreds of thousands of Europeans have been stranded in the Gulf states since Iran responded to US and Israeli strikes by attacking its neighbours.

item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today

item.title: Philippine lawmakers advance impeachment of vice president Duterte
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The daughter of former President Rodrigo Duterte survived a similar impeachment bid last year.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Rafizi’s ex-aide hits out at MACC for public search notice

Source: Free Malaysia Today

item.title: Sri Lanka rescues 32 sailors from sunk Iranian warship
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Sri Lanka's defence ministry said it was searching for the other crew of the IRIS Dena, which went down about 40km south of the island.
Matched: parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Pastor Koh’s family seeks to challenge govt appeal against discovery order
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
It wants to cite a parliamentary Hansard from Nov 13 last year containing home minister Saifuddin Nasution Ismail’s remarks on the case of missing activist Amri Che Mat.
Matched: law(+3), parliament(+2), court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Court upholds 40-year jail term for man who killed mother
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The Federal Court says it was a heinous and morally reprehensible crime committed by the son, worsened by concealing the body in a septic tank.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: CIMB denies data breach involving 1.2mil records
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The banking group says its security teams have verified that all systems are safe amid online claims of a data leak.
Matched: ai(+3), cybersecurity(+3), breach(+3)

item.title: Japan eyes remote Pacific island for nuclear waste
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Nuclear power is making a comeback worldwide, but finding permanent storage sites for spent fuel is a huge challenge.
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Rafizi's ex-aide denies being in hiding, says MACC never contacted him directly
item.description:
Source: The Star Nation (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR: Former special functions officer to ex-economy minister Datuk Seri Rafizi Ramli, James Chai, denies that he is in hiding after the Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission (MACC) issued a public notice seeking information on his whereabouts. Read full story
Matched: corruption(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Despite war, Iranian diaspora in LA hopes to see World Cup team
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
After days of strikes and retaliatory attacks, Iran’s involvement in the Fifa World Cup 2026 is now seriously in doubt amid widening conflict.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)
